## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related issue

Link the issue this PR addresses (for example, `Closes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance
- [ ] Tests only

## Testing

Describe tests you ran and the results.

- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `black --check .`

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the repository coding standards
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`

Thanks for contributing to VetGraph. Please consider starring and forking the repository to support the project.
